name: Cave World Ownership
description: Wang Lin becomes the owner of the Cave World after slaying the Seven-Colored Daoist. A world's worth of beings now fall under his karma.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Cave World Ownership. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
